chunks.title: Introduction and Thesis
chunks.reason: The text opens with the title of the book followed by the central thesis statement declaring all things as vanity.

chunks.title: Cyclical Nature of Creation and History
chunks.reason: This section argues that human labor yields no advantage due to the repetitive cycles of nature and the lack of lasting memory in history.

chunks.title: The Preacher's Experience with Wisdom
chunks.reason: The speaker describes his personal investigation into wisdom and concludes that increased knowledge leads to greater vexation.
